name: Mrs. Fields Cookies
recipeIngredient: Optional: Chopped nuts (such as pecans or walnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk (about 1/4 cup per batch), until just combined.
5. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped nuts (if using).
6. Drop rounded tablespoon-sized scoops of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
8. Turn off the oven and let the cookies cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing.
